name: vadal
description: Vadal.ai monorepo — product front-end (apps/product) + design system (packages/design-system).
comment-optionalDependencies: Tailwind v4 (lightningcss + @tailwindcss/oxide) ships platform-specific native binaries. The lockfile is generated on macOS, so without these the linux-x64-gnu binaries Vercel needs are absent. Pinned here at the same versions as the parent packages; skipped on non-linux hosts by OS mismatch.
